---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for J.A.N.E.T. Seed
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Please provide a clear and detailed description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Expansion Protocol Considerations
<!-- J.A.N.E.T. Seed grows only with consent. Consider: -->

- [ ] This feature maintains offline-first operation
- [ ] This feature does not require silent background behavior
- [ ] This feature respects consent gates and user agency
- [ ] This feature does not auto-expand capabilities
- [ ] This feature preserves interruptibility (Red Thread)
- [ ] This feature aligns with constitutional axioms

### Relevant Axioms
<!-- Which axioms are relevant to this feature request? -->

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered alternative approaches? What are the trade-offs?

## Additional Context
Any other relevant information, use cases, or examples.

## Expansion Risk Assessment
<!-- For features that might expand Janet's capabilities: -->

Does this feature:
- [ ] Require new dependencies or external services?
- [ ] Add new network connections or API calls?
- [ ] Modify memory behavior or data persistence?
- [ ] Change how Janet interacts with the user or system?

If yes to any of the above, please describe how consent and user agency are preserved.

---

**Note**: Feature requests are evaluated based on alignment with J.A.N.E.T. Seed's constitutional framework. Features that compromise consent, privacy, interruptibility, or grounding may not be accepted, even if technically feasible.
